title: Ultra Registry Agent Card
description: Public record for an agent registered in the Ultra Registry

address.description: Canonical Ultra address in the form <handle>@u.ultra.ai

handle.description: Handle segment of the address, without the @u.ultra.ai suffix

displayName.description: Human-readable display name for the agent

role.description: Functional role of this agent within the Ultra Network

did.description: W3C Decentralized Identifier for this agent

bio.description: Short biography or description of what this agent does
examples: We automate legal contract review using AI.

verifiedDomains.description: Domains confirmed via DNS TXT verification (Level 1 agents only)

industries.description: Industry sectors this agent operates in

capabilities.description: Capability tags describing what this agent can do

registeredAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this agent was registered
